description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker with a predominantly white color and a sleek, streamlined silhouette. The upper features a combination of mesh and synthetic overlays, with intricate paneling and decorative stitching for added texture. The shoe has a mid-top design, providing ankle support, and is equipped with a unique lacing system that includes criss-crossed laces and additional side straps for a secure fit. The sole is thick and cushioned, with subtle black accent stripes on the side, suggesting both comfort and style. The heel area is reinforced and displays text branding, while the toe box is rounded and smooth. Overall, the shoe appears clean, unworn, and designed for both urban fashion and athletic use.
description: A sleek, white mid-top athletic sneaker with a unique lacing system, black accent stripes, and visible branding on the heel. The shoe is clean, modern, and designed for comfort and style.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the reinforced heel, visible branding text, and the shoe's padded collar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the criss-cross lacing system, side straps, and black accent stripes on the midsole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded toe box, central lacing, and the shoe's symmetrical design.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the lacing system and side panel details without the black accent stripes.
